explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in A tier with an overall score of 50 from a base nutrition score of 47. Context lifted it by 3 points.

topPros.title: sweetness is kept unusually well in check

topCons.title: protein contribution is tiny
topCons.explanation: That is normal for fruit, but it still limits nutritional breadth.

closing.summary: Strawberries has a genuinely strong overall case, especially sweetness is kept unusually well in check and easy to use as a whole food. the downsides are there, but protein contribution is tiny and sugar can climb fast do not outweigh the upside. best when you want sweetness that still earns its place nutritionally.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when you want sweetness that still earns its place nutritionally.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
